fields.label: Organization Slug Name or ID

fields.label: Version
fields.description: A version identifier for this release. Can be a version number, a commit hash etc.

fields.label: URL
fields.description: A URL that points to the release. This can be the path to an online interface to the sourcecode for instance.

fields.label: Project Names or IDs
fields.description: A list of project slugs that are involved in this release. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression. (multiple values: comma-separated)

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: dateReleased, commits, refs)
